title: nassella nutans
intro: Nassella nutans, also known as squirrel tail grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Nassella nutans can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal medicine.
